creator: George Orwell

title: The Great Gatsby

description: Details a day in the life of Clarissa Dalloway, a high-society woman in post-World War I England.

title: The Catcher in the Rye

creator: Aldous Huxley

title: Frankenstein
creator: Mary Shelley
description: Tells the story of Victor Frankenstein, a young scientist who creates a sapient creature in an unorthodox scientific experiment.

creator: Emily Brontë

title: The Stranger
creator: Albert Camus
description: Presents the story of Meursault, an indifferent French Algerian who, after attending his mother's funeral, apathetically kills an Arab man.

title: Moby-Dick

title: The Trial

title: The Sun Also Rises

title: Ulysses
